subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! This kindly one arrived at the Sacred Spot, bowed his head in homage, and called to mind the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان مهربان ببقعه مبارکه وارد سر باستان نهاد و بیاد یاران افتاد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the departed, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
